properties.name: recommend.regular.service-url
properties.description: 外部协同过滤推荐服务地址

properties.name: recommend.regular.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: CF 服务连接超时（毫秒）

properties.name: recommend.regular.read-timeout-ms
properties.description: CF 服务读取超时（毫秒）

properties.name: recommend.regular.request-top-n
properties.description: 请求外部 CF 服务时的候选数量

properties.name: recommend.regular.cold-start-limit
properties.description: 用户冷启动推荐返回上限

properties.name: recommend.regular.candidate-pool-size
properties.description: 常规 CF 过滤后参与图谱打分的候选池大小

properties.name: recommend.regular.cf-weight
properties.description: 常规 CF 分数在融合排序中的权重

properties.name: recommend.cache.cold-start-ttl-minutes
properties.description: 冷启动推荐结果缓存时间（分钟）

properties.name: recommend.cache.regular-ttl-minutes
properties.description: 常规推荐结果缓存时间（分钟）

properties.name: recommend.cache.build-lock-ttl-seconds
properties.description: 推荐结果回源构建锁过期时间（秒）

properties.name: recommend.cache.score-matrix-enabled
properties.description: 是否缓存 CF 评分矩阵快照

properties.name: recommend.cache.score-matrix-ttl-minutes
properties.description: CF 评分矩阵快照缓存时间（分钟）

properties.name: recommend.score.base
properties.description: 前端展示分基础值

properties.name: recommend.score.span
properties.description: 前端展示分映射跨度

properties.name: recommend.hot-fallback.limit
properties.description: 热门兜底推荐返回上限

properties.name: recommend.hot-fallback.max-scan-count
properties.description: 热门兜底最多扫描热榜数量

properties.name: recommend.graph.prerequisite-threshold
properties.description: 图谱先修掌握阈值

properties.name: recommend.graph.learning-path-limit-per-course
properties.description: 每门推荐课程返回的补齐路径上限

properties.name: recommend.async.enabled
properties.description: 推荐主链路异步执行总开关，关闭后回退到串行执行

properties.name: recommend.async.core-size
properties.description: 推荐异步线程池核心线程数

properties.name: recommend.async.max-size
properties.description: 推荐异步线程池最大线程数

properties.name: recommend.async.queue-capacity
properties.description: 推荐异步线程池队列容量

properties.name: recommend.hot-sync.enabled
properties.description: 是否定时同步 Redis 课程热度到数据库快照

properties.name: recommend.hot-sync.fixed-delay-ms
properties.description: 课程热度同步间隔（毫秒）

properties.name: recommend.hot-sync.batch-size
properties.description: 课程热度同步批次大小

properties.name: recommend.new-course.enabled
properties.description: 是否启用常规推荐中的新课候选补充

properties.name: recommend.new-course.window-days
properties.description: 新课发布时间窗口（天）

properties.name: recommend.new-course.candidate-limit
properties.description: 新课预召回候选池大小

properties.name: recommend.new-course.regular-candidate-limit
properties.description: 常规 CF 链路准备的新课候选数量

properties.name: recommend.new-course.fallback-limit
properties.description: CF 为空时的新课兜底上限

properties.name: recommend.new-course.inject-limit
properties.description: 单次最多注入的新课数量

properties.name: recommend.new-course.max-exposure-ratio
properties.description: 新课在常规推荐结果中的最大曝光占比

properties.name: recommend.new-course.inject-slots
properties.description: 新课固定注入槽位

properties.name: recommend.new-course.readiness-threshold
properties.description: 新课 readiness 批量计算使用的先修掌握阈值
